title: Force Fair Minimap
description: This plugin disables the minimap in Xaero's Minimap and disables entity radar (for Xaero's World Map) in the Nether.
body: This plugin sends invisible tellraw strings to the client to force settings in Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map. The plugin disables the minimap in Xaero's Minimap and disables entity radar (for Xaero's World Map). The plugin disables cave view (for Xareo's World Map) in the Overworld and End.
